message:
chore(web): add touch polish and fix focus ring behaviors

Touch polish:
- SpotlightSearch CategoryPill: add touch-manipulation, active:scale-95, focus-visible ring
- SearchTrigger: add touch-manipulation, active:scale-[0.98], focus-visible ring
- Corpus DocCard Link: add focus-visible ring matching Card's rounded-2xl

Accessibility fixes:
- CrosswalkTable links: change focus: to focus-visible: for keyboard-only rings
- CrosswalkTable headers: change focus: to focus-visible: for keyboard-only rings

Also: Fix DistillationViewer to apply JargonText to plain text fallback
